title: Playground Review Board
concept: A task-board workflow for core contributors where Create, Save, Manage, Inspect, Export, and Debug lanes organize every Playground capability while a live WordPress preview and selected-card editor stay visible beside the board.
focus: PR review workflow for core contributors
split preview and selected task editor
dark diagnostics surface with light task cards
flows: Start Playgrounds from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, .zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save an unsaved Playground to browser storage or a local directory, with visible file-copy progress.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds from board cards, including open, rename, delete, continue, and inspect actions.
Use Site Manager tasks for runtime settings, file browsing, Blueprint editing, database tools, and logs while keeping the WordPress preview visible.
Move work out through Export to GitHub, Download as .zip, copy or download Blueprint bundles, and download database.sqlite.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and stored Save and Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty state
